What would you like to know about?: What would you like to know about?
<ac>Grand Dream City is under attack by: <ac>Grand Dream City is under attack by the notorious Team Xen!
<ac>Traversing around the weathered city: <ac>Traversing around the weathered city and doing your best to help the helpless is key to success!
<ac>However, there are obstacles that bl: <ac>However, there are obstacles that block your path that require you to recruit allies you find around the city!
<ac>Some obstacles and interactions requ: <ac>Some obstacles and interactions require a specific combination and number of recruits.
<ac>Gaining more recruits will increase: <ac>Gaining more recruits will increase your Group Effort level, which will allow you to tackle certain obstacles.
<ac>Depending on your actions up to this: <ac>Depending on your actions up to this point, some recruits may or may not appear.
<ac>You can see the requirements using K: <ac>You can see the requirements using Kanon's Analysis ability. This ability is always passively active on the overworld.
<ac>One last thing! Things may seem dire: <ac>One last thing! Things may seem dire, but there is no time limit! Take your time to explore and do as much as you can!
<ac>There are obstacles that block your: <ac>There are obstacles that block your path. These can be removed by the people you recruit.
<ac>Recruits are people you may have com: <ac>Recruits are people you may have come across and helped on your journey up to this point!
<ac>The more people you recruit, the str: <ac>The more people you recruit, the stronger you get!
<ac>This strength is measured by your Gr: <ac>This strength is measured by your Group Effort level.
<ac>Some obstacles require a certain lev: <ac>Some obstacles require a certain level to destroy. So be sure to recruit as many people as possible!
